raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 373 aims to enhance protections for students placed in out-of-state facilities by imposing new accountability requirements on the LEAs that send students to nonpublic schools.",
    "The legislation mandates that LEAs inform parents and students of their rights, including direct access to the Equitable Services Ombudsman.",
    "SB 373 ensures private communication between students and their education teams while at the facility.",
    "The bill requires LEAs to conduct quarterly unmonitored phone check‑ins and hold annual in‑person private meetings during each onsite visit to rigorously assess student health and safety.",
    "SB 373 establishes extra certification requirements for out-of-state nonpublic schools, including strict protocols regarding the use of physical restraints and isolation.",
    "The legislation includes enhanced rights awareness, robust complaint mechanisms, and informed consent processes for students in out-of-state nonpublic schools."
  ]
}
```
